name: Suspicious PsExec Execution Detected
description: Detection of suspicious PsExec or PaExec execution with a renamed service name. This helps to identify lateral movement attempts where an adversary uses a modified or non-standard PsExec client to evade detection, which is a common lateral movement technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious **PsExec/PaExec** execution was detected. The command was executed via the **`IPC$`** share and a non-standard service name, which is a strong indicator of an adversary attempting to perform **Lateral Movement** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1021**) with a modified or unknown PsExec client. The event occurred with Event ID **5145** under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to block the malicious process.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
